pages.text: After coming across an appointment letter for a Grand Chancellor—perhaps carelessly left behind by the Royal Family in the Fortress of Calamity—an audacious idea crosses your mind. What if, using the original appointment document for high officials as a reference, you forge a false appointment letter? Could you then elevate one of the illagers loyal to you to replace a true Grand Chancellor?

You will need to lure a high-ranking official to come, capture him, and have your Envioker use the forged appointment letter to eliminate him—perhaps you can secretly steal his identity without anyone noticing!
